w3_boundary_verbatim: 본 보고의 탐지기 사다리·모든 val-A/val-B 수치의 유효 범위는 CubiCasa SEG-IR 우주 한정이다. E1 실무 도면 전이는 미검증이다.

input_hashes.role: F04 cell map and method admissibility
resolved frozen classical artifact and bands
prior BLOCKED_INPUT record and transform population
sealed relation registry and drawing-macro metric
exact LID, per-variant violation and drawing-macro aggregation definitions
binary per-handle flip comparator and sentinel semantics
frozen evidence parameters and band membership
model identity, threshold and inference rule
fixed transform parameter population and prior zero-eligible stop

instrument_definition_discovery.common_metric_source_quote: metric: R-META drawing-macro violation rate = 1 - invariance
instrument_definition_discovery.common_aggregation_source_quote: 셀의 주 반응 `R-META_{k,b}`는 도면별 위반율을 먼저 parameter 표본에 대해 동일 가중 평균하고, 다시 40개 도면에 동일 가중 평균한 **drawing-macro violation rate**다.
instrument_definition_discovery.current_population_adaptation: the packet-sealed synthetic population has 50 drawings, so the discovered equal-weight drawing-macro formula is applied to all 50 rather than the dossier proposal's 40-drawing archive population
instrument_definition_discovery.band_source_quote: PASS `R-META <= 0.02` / INCONCLUSIVE `0.02 < R-META <= 0.10` / FAIL `R-META > 0.10` / UNKNOWN = no admissible numeric measurement (never coerced).

cells.what_is_measured: occurrence-level LID binary wall-label violation under translation for the frozen classical six-feature HGBDT
cells.validity_gate: inverse transform restores endpoints and topology

cells.what_is_measured: occurrence-level LID binary wall-label violation under rotation for the frozen classical six-feature HGBDT
cells.validity_gate: inverse rotation restores endpoints and topology

cells.what_is_measured: occurrence-level LID binary wall-label violation under positive uniform scale for the frozen classical six-feature HGBDT
cells.validity_gate: factor is positive and inverse scaling restores geometry

cells.what_is_measured: occurrence-level LID binary wall-label violation after physically equivalent mm/m unit re-encoding for the frozen classical six-feature HGBDT
cells.validity_gate: coordinates, $INSUNITS, and scale_mm_per_unit encode the same physical quantities

cells.what_is_measured: occurrence-level LID binary wall-label violation after recursive block explode for the frozen classical six-feature HGBDT
cells.validity_gate: no remaining INSERT; occurrence mapping bijective; world topology unchanged

cells.what_is_measured: occurrence-level LID binary wall-label violation under bijective layer renaming for the frozen classical six-feature HGBDT
cells.validity_gate: layer map bijective and geometry hash unchanged

cells.what_is_measured: occurrence-level LID binary wall-label violation under certified deterministic bounded coordinate jitter for the frozen classical six-feature HGBDT
cells.validity_gate: nonzero segments, unchanged incidence/topology, certified parallel-band margin, and input-only decision-margin certificate

frozen_classical_model.inference_rule: arithmetic mean of the three positive-class predict_proba values; wall iff mean probability >= 0.5

primary_metric.per_variant: v[d,k,p] = flips over base occurrence-level LIDs divided by base LID count; missing mapped LIDs count as flips
primary_metric.per_drawing: equal-weight arithmetic mean over the preregistered parameters of relation k
primary_metric.cell: equal-weight arithmetic mean over all 50 drawings

bands.BLOCKED_INPUT: definition, input, artifact, parity, qualification, certificate or eligible population unavailable

common_admissibility: all fixed input SHA-256 values match
frozen model bundle identity, six-feature order, threshold, seeds and training-manifest hash match
mandatory cubicasa_ml same-fixture exact parity passes
all 50 base drawings produce a nonempty unique LID population
all preregistered drawing-parameter transform certificates pass
after prediction LID schema is complete and bijective
repeat normalized-prediction checksums match on the first five sorted base scenes
complete-base-population constant-zero and near-all flags are false
truth-bearing positive entity recall is at least 0.20
zero_eligible_stop: if a cell has zero eligible drawing-parameter pairs, emit BLOCKED_INPUT and no R-META number
